summary: Testing and bug fix for three features: 1) Go to Post navigation - FIXED missing GET /api/posts/{post_id} endpoint, 2) Comment reactions API - WORKING, 3) Edit Post emoji picker - IMPLEMENTED. All 10 backend tests pass.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Added missing GET /api/posts/{post_id} endpoint - was returning 405 Method Not Allowed
Comment reactions API (POST/GET /api/comments/{comment_id}/reactions) working correctly with toggle behavior
Single post endpoint returns liked/saved status for viewer
TextareaWithEmoji component properly integrated in EditPostModal for caption editing
CommentWithReaction component in PostCard.js shows heart icon with reaction picker on long-press

success_rate.frontend: Code review verified - all three features implemented correctly

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user and posts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three bug fixes verified: 1) GET /api/posts/{post_id} endpoint added to backend - was missing causing 405 error when navigating to single post view. 2) Comment reactions API fully functional with toggle behavior (add/remove/update). 3) Edit Post modal uses TextareaWithEmoji component for emoji picker in caption field. Frontend protected route correctly redirects to auth with redirect parameter preserved.

endpoints_tested.GET /api/posts/{post_id}: PASS - Returns single post with liked/saved status (NEW ENDPOINT ADDED)
endpoints_tested.GET /api/posts/{post_id}/comments: PASS - Returns comments with reaction_count and viewer_reaction

go_to_post_navigation.issue: GET /api/posts/{post_id} endpoint was missing - returned 405 Method Not Allowed

comment_reactions.issue: Feature request - add emoji reactions on comments
comment_reactions.fix: Already implemented - CommentWithReaction component in PostCard.js, API endpoints in posts.py

edit_post_emoji_picker.issue: Feature request - add emoji picker to Edit Post caption
edit_post_emoji_picker.fix: Already implemented - TextareaWithEmoji component in PostMenu.js EditPostModal
